title: senecio pringlei
intro: Senecio pringlei, also known as Pringle's ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Senecio pringlei are often used to make infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
